name: Planet Communications Asia Public Company Limited
summary: Planet Communications Asia Public Company Limited engages in the distribution, installation, and maintenance of telecommunication equipment in Thailand. The company operates through three segments: Products and Solution, Services, and Service Provider. It offers telecommunications technology products, such as satellite earth station, wireless network, digital radio communications, and optical fiber network systems; smart office solutions comprising telepresence and video conference, centralized telecommunications system, audio conference, closed circuit television, and Internet network/Wi-Fi; cyber security solutions, consisting of network security, transaction security, and fire wall; and digital broadcasting solutions, which includes television program production system, multimedia and content production studio, content distribution and transmission, and terrestrial digital television set-top box. The company also provides satellite mobile vehicle; mobile phone and radio jammer for military operations and security; and peripheral and accessories, such as cables and connectors, and fiber optic components. In addition, it offers pre-sale, implementation and installation, after sales, and rental services for telecommunication equipment and systems. Further, the company provides PlanetFiber that offers high-speed internet through fiber optic networks for mid- and high-rise condominiums; and PlanetCloud, which provides cloud services for the office. It serves broadcasting, telecommunications service provider, commercial, public, and international sectors. The company was formerly known as Technology Gateway Asia Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Planet Communications Asia Public Company Limited in 1998. Planet Communications Asia Public Company Limited was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
